title: gossypium ellenbeckii
intro: Gossypium ellenbeckii, also known as Ellenbeck's cotton or Eritrean cotton, is a species of flowering plant in the cotton genus Gossypium. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gossypium ellenbeckii include treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
